name: Question
description: Ask a usage question or get help with DevArchitecture
title: "[Question]: "
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

## What do you want to do?

A short description of your goal (e.g. "Run WebAPI with Docker", "Point `clients/react-admin` at another API URL").

## What have you tried?

- Commands, config, or steps you’ve already tried.
- Docs you’ve read (`README`, `docs/BREAKING-CHANGES-NET10.md`, [devarchitecture.net](https://www.devarchitecture.net)).

## Environment (if relevant)

- **.NET SDK:** (e.g. 10.0.x)
- **Client (if relevant):** (e.g. Vue admin, Angular admin, Blazor WASM)
- **Node.js:** (e.g. 22.x LTS — for `clients/*` npm apps)
- **OS:**

## Additional context

Optional: deployment target, constraints, or links.
